title: Invincible Bees
description: This pack turns Bees into the Invincible Bee Meme. We can finally be Bees.
body:
# Invincible Bees
This pack turns the bees into 1 of 4 Invincible characters, these characters are Invincible, Omni-Man, Rex Splode, and Blue Invincible. All of them have the same chance of appearing a part from the Blue Invincible which has a lower chance to spawn. This pack **requires** either Optifine or Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features.

This Pack was made because I was bored. So hope you enjoy it.

## **REQUIREMENTS LINKS**
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)
